name: cpig-kin-06-fork-bound-static
description: kin-06 Fork Bound + Static Equilibrium — load the leading-link fork with 3 §11 body_geometry bindings (lowerLink + upperLink + carrier proxy boxes), solve via ConstrainedManifoldSolver under a 20 N wheel load, render through Preview Diagram in Skeleton + Bodies mode (Display Mode = 2). Phase 4.C body-binding demo.

setup.vlmDescription: A four-bar fork mechanism shown at static equilibrium under load — three solid shaded bodies are visible (two parallel horizontal arms and a vertical wheel carrier on the right), all snapped onto the kinematic skeleton via Phase 4 body-binding. The skeleton frame triads and pivot circles are drawn at 50% alpha behind the solid bodies. The coil-over spring between the column and upper link shows visible compression below the design pose.
